---
title: "Writing"
---

This page is under construction...

## General tips
- Start with a clear research question and scope
- Write early; revise often (small iterations)
- Prefer short, structured drafts (bullets → paragraphs)

## Practical templates
- Paper skeleton (Intro/Methods/Results/Discussion)
- Reviewer response template
- Figure-first writing workflow

## Recommended references
- (Add 5–10 core references you actually like)
